message:
fix(safety): harden JS array limits, process cleanup, mutex recovery, and oscillation guard

- extensions_js: reject arrays >10M elements in js_to_json_inner to
  prevent OOM; cap initial Vec allocation at 1024; fix resolve_module
  test to pass root paths
- tools: move ProcessGuard kill+wait into a background thread so Drop
  never blocks the async runtime
- interactive/ext_session, package_manager: recover from poisoned
  mutexes via PoisonError::into_inner instead of panicking
- extension_scoring: replace signum() != 0.0 with abs() > EPSILON for
  correct oscillation guard on near-zero routing deltas

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
